top3.sql:
SELECT 
    d.driverId,
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN r.statusId = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_rate
FROM races ra
JOIN results r ON ra.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE ra.date = '1983-07-16'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname;

SELECT 
    d.driverId,
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN r.statusId = 1 THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS completion_rate
FROM races ra
JOIN results r ON ra.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE ra.date = '1983-07-16'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname;

SELECT 
    d.driverId,
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN r.statusId = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_rate
FROM races ra
JOIN results r ON ra.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE ra.date = '1983-07-16'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname;

SELECT 
    d.driverId,
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    ROUND(
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN r.position IS NOT NULL AND r.position != 'R' AND r.position != 'D' AND r.position != 'E' AND r.position != 'F' AND r.position != 'W' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*),
        4
    ) AS completion_rate
FROM races ra
JOIN results r ON ra.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE ra.date = '1983-07-16'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;

SELECT 
    d.driverId,
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN r.statusId = 1 THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS completion_rate
FROM races ra
JOIN results r ON ra.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE ra.date = '1983-07-16'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname;

SELECT 
    d.driverId,
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN r.statusId = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_rate
FROM races ra
JOIN results r ON ra.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE ra.date = '1983-07-16'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname;

SELECT 
    d.driverId,
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    ROUND(
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN r.position IS NOT NULL AND r.position != 'R' AND r.position != 'D' AND r.position != 'E' AND r.position != 'F' AND r.position != 'W' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*),
        4
    ) AS completion_rate
FROM races ra
JOIN results r ON ra.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE ra.date = '1983-07-16'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;

SELECT 
    d.driverId,
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    ROUND(
        1.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN r.positionOrder IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*),
        4
    ) AS completion_rate
FROM races ra
JOIN results r ON ra.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE ra.date = '1983-07-16'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY completion_rate DESC;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    d.driverId,
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN r.statusId = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_rate
FROM races ra
JOIN results r ON ra.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE ra.date = '1983-07-16'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname;
